title.en: The top of the Tower of Babel.

content.en:
The top of the Tower of Babel.

Xiao Yue began to open up the dantian world, and around her, a large number of world source stones were piled up, the number of which was about two thousand.

Ye Tian will not be stingy with his wife, he has a lot of world source stones, and taking out two thousand pieces is nothing.

He estimated that his wife should use less than two thousand pieces, and if it was less, he would continue to increase the number of World Source Stones, and if it was too much, he would take it away.

Time passes little by little, and the process of opening up the world is very careful and a waste of time, and it must not be sloppy.

Although Ye Tian was worried about his wife, he didn't dare to interfere, everything could only rely on Xiao Yue herself.

In case he intervenes, it will cause his wife to be distracted, thus opening up a crippled world, which will directly affect his future combat effectiveness and cultivation speed, and so on.

Therefore, he can only guard quietly, unless Xiao Yue really has an abnormal situation, he will interfere.

In the blink of an eye, three days passed.

Rumble!!!!

A breath of the world passed from Xiao Yue's body.

Although Ye Tian had not hit the galaxy level, he was also very aware of the situation of the great god's impact on the galaxy level, which was clearly a sign of opening up the dantian world.

"Yue'er, hurry up and absorb the energy of the world's source stones, consolidate the dantian world, and improve the quality of the world!"

Ye Tian said.

Xiao Yue didn't speak, but her actions proved that she heard Ye Tian's words.

Whoa!!

The pieces of world source stones were absorbed and refined by Xiao Yue, and their energy poured into the dantian world, which was used to stabilize the world and improve the quality of the world.

As time passed, the World Source Stone was constantly consumed.

In this way, Xiao Yue spent a whole day refining the World Source Stone.

"1,328 World Source Stones, the potential is okay!"

Ye Tian commented.

Immediately, with a wave of his hand, he put away the remaining World Source Stones.

Then he waited for a few more hours.

Xiao Yue slowly opened her eyes and looked at Ye Tian, "Husband, I have successfully been promoted to galaxy level!"

"Come, I'll test your world quality!"

Ye Tian took out a bead and said.

This bead is a world bead that specializes in testing the quality of the world, and can accurately test the quality of the dantian world of the gods.

"Hmm!"

Xiao Yue took the World Bead and mobilized the power of the world in her body to pour into the World Bead.

Soon, the world beads began to take on a strange appearance, shining with a faint light.

After a while, a number appeared inside the World Bead -

"Three!"

"Husband, what does this three represent?" Xiao Yue was curious.

In fact, she doesn't know much about the quality of the world, so she doesn't know much about the division of the world's quality by the world beads.

"The various races in the universe have a detailed division of the dantian world, from the nine-grade world to the first-grade world, of which the nine-grade world is the lowest, and the first-grade world is the highest in the grade division. And there are three levels above the Yipin World, which are Xiao Qian, Da Qian, and Heaven Level!"

"Although there are still three levels of world quality in the Yipin World, the Small Thousand World, the Great Thousand World, and the Heavenly Realm, it is actually very difficult to surpass the First Grade World, and even some Eternal Highnesses may not be able to condense the Small Thousand World. Yue'er, it's already remarkable that you can condense the three-grade world!"

Ye Tian praised.

Hearing Ye Tian's praise, Xiao Yue was very happy.

Actually, she doesn't care too much about the world of several products, as long as Ye Tian is happy.

In the next few days, Ye Tian accompanied his wife more, and by the way, he left some resources for his wife, and then returned to the supreme hall of the human race and continued to cultivate.

this day.

Ye Tian was cultivating, and the Dark Lord took the initiative to see Ye Tian.

"Your Highness, a great thing!"

The Darkness Dominates.

"What's the good thing?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Dark Lord smiled and said, "I know that Your Highness has been compressing immortal power recently, but compressing immortal power is a very time-wasting but tedious practice that has to be done. In particular, His Royal Highness is at the limit of the great god level, and in order to increase the foundation, he has to compress the immortal power. Although His Highness is not worried about the time problem, His Highness should also want to compress the immortal power to the limit as soon as possible, right?"

"Yes, I do want to compress the immortal power to the limit!"

Ye Tian nodded and admitted.

"Now there is an opportunity to allow His Highness to compress the immortal power to the limit in a very short period of time!"

The Darkness Dominates.

"Oh, what chance?" Ye Tian became interested.

In fact, his time acceleration ability could increase his cultivation speed by nearly 1,000 times, but he was still not satisfied.

Others at his current level would definitely go to the galactic level, but he wanted to pursue the real limit.

But the real limit is so difficult, even with the talent for time, it is very difficult.

So, he still needs a chance.

"The Spirit Clan's Lingyun Heavenly Realm is about to open, and the Spirit Clan is a cosmic clan with the deepest research on energy, the Spirit Clan's Lingyun Heavenly Realm is very peculiar, it can suppress all the energy such as divine power and immortal power of the great god level, and if you go deep into the depths of the Lingyun Heavenly Realm, the greater the spiritual pressure you will bear. Some great gods have even compressed their divine power to a point that is extremely close to the limit, but they can still compress their divine power again in the Lingyun Heavenly Realm and break their own limit. His Highness's immortal power limit is definitely far beyond that of other great gods, so it is even more difficult for His Highness to reach his own limit, and the Spirit Cloud Heavenly Realm is an opportunity!" said the Dark Lord.

"Lord of Darkness, according to what you said, the Spirit Cloud Heavenly Realm is the place of the Spirit Clan, and I can enter it?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Yes, the Spirit Race is actually a peaceful and friendly cosmic clan, and it is good at making friends with other cosmic clans, and this time the Lingyun Heavenly Realm was opened, and the Spirit Clan issued some quotas to all races in the universe, and our human race also received eight places. In the past, although we Terrans could get places, we only had three or four places at most. It is estimated that last time, His Highness shined in the world of ruins, crushing the Highnesses of other universe clans, and making the human race more famous. In addition, the human race has now transformed into an immortal race, and its strength is even stronger, so it has won eight places!"

The Darkness Dominates.

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded clearly.

Eight places, one of which must have Ye Tian, even other supreme-level forces dare not erase Ye Tian's place.

Ye Tian's quota can be considered to be decided, but it will take a little time for the Lingyun Heaven Realm to open.

Therefore, Ye Tian had to wait a few more days.

In the blink of an eye, three months have passed.

this day.

The Supreme Hall of the Human Race informed Ye Tian that the day had come to go to the Lingyun Heavenly Realm!
